E11
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

E8 - Rheas-Cerrado
programme.desc: Every year in the dry season, as the floodwaters disappear, the grasslands of the Pantanal are home to many species: giant anteaters, maned wolves and the greater rheas- the largest bird in South America.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E8 - Rheas-Cerrado

programme.title: E5 - Lion Daycare
programme.desc: Discover why it takes a village to raise lion cubs in Kenya and sniff out the mating strategy of fragrant lemurs in Madagascar. Cut a rug at a honeybee dance party, then listen up as a forked-tailed drongo tricks other birds out of their dinner.

programme.title: E6 - Shark Dentist
programme.desc: Marvel at the toothy fish that help sharks maintain their pearly whites and discover the signature calls of dolphin families. Examine capuchin monkey’s nut-cracking stone tools, get the warm fuzzies when giraffes snuggle, and meet a meerkat mobster.

programme.title: E9 - Giant Otter Refuge
programme.desc: Join biologists on a hike through a giant otter refuge in the southern Pantanal. Will they find these shy, elusive animals or just the evidence of their day-to-day lives? On the trail, check in on amorous tapirs and water-loving Muscovy ducks.

programme.title: When Night Falls In Toronto
programme.desc: 'We're just like New York,' they say of their city, and usually add: 'Only nicer!' Toronto is a melting pot of diverse cultures. Most of its residents have immigrated, at some point.

programme.title: He Plays For The Worst National Football Team On Earth: San Marino
programme.desc: What is it like to play for the worst national football team in the world? While everyone is watching the worldcup, we follow Nicola (26), the only full-time professional footballer in San Marino's national team, as he prepares for one of the biggest matches in the country's recent football history.

programme.title: Abolish Prisons? - What Works Better Than Incarceration
programme.desc: Approximately 58,000 people are currently incarcerated in German prisons. Over half of them reoffend after their release. These statistics raise doubts about the prison system. Is something fundamentally wrong with German prisons?

programme.title: When Night Falls In Toronto
programme.desc: 'We're just like New York,' they say of their city, and usually add: 'Only nicer!' Toronto is a melting pot of diverse cultures. Most of its residents have immigrated, at some point.

programme.title: From Competition To Combat: Athletes In The Baltic States Prepare For Defen
programme.desc: In the Baltic states, athletes are preparing for more than just competition. As Russia's war in Ukraine reshapes Europe's security landscape, athletes in Latvia, Lithuania and Estonia balance elite training with military service. From conscription to volunteer defense leagues, their skills are increasingly tied to national defense, blurring the line between being an athlete and a soldier.

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 2 - Winter
programme.desc: In early September 1941, the German Wehrmacht was advancing on all fronts in the Soviet Union. Kyiv had fallen, the Smolensk stronghold had been defeated and Leningrad was under siege. Hitler intended to launch a major offensive against Moscow before the winter.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The 51 Percent
programme.desc: The 51 Percent is revolving around women and their role in the world. The program presents various stories of women with different backgrounds, women fighting for equality, women in politics and their work, women promoting sexual education all over the world, women in sports, and women on the front line.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

Through real workplace situations, the show reveals the challenges of leadership, communication, and management.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

E1 - Big Surprises on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's a day of big surprises at Lellobee City Farm! The adventure begins when Ella & Bee find a mysterious egg & have no idea who it belongs to. They become 'The Egg Detectives' & question all the birds, only to find out it's a tortoise egg! The surprises continue with the arrival of a brand new tractor & a visit from two very special guests: tiger twins who love to play hide-and-seek!

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E2 - Let's Sing Our Favorite Classic Songs!
programme.desc: Come sing your favorite classic songs with Kii & Yii! The sing-along starts on Old MacDonald's farm, where the friends learn how to spell the friendly dog's name in the song 'Bingo'! Then, listen as Mr. Cat sings a story about his grand adventure visiting the Queen in her palace. The fun continues with the story of the Lion & the Unicorn, the flying adventure of 'Two Little Dicky Birds' & a song about the Old Woman Who Lived in a Shoe.

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E21 - Kids vs Parents: Football Showdown
programme.desc: Join JJ and friends for an ultimate sports day! Challenge the parents to a huge soccer match, play basketball against animal pals, and work together in a friendly game of baseball. It's not about winning, but doing your best and having fun!

programme.title: E2 - Pitch Perfect Playtime Party
programme.desc: Come to a playtime party with Mia and her friends! Roll and bounce with Twinkle the magic ball, find the courage to jump into a giant ball pit, and pretend to be hopping kangaroos. End the day with a fun dance party where everyone shakes their bums!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Rescue Missions!
programme.desc: Join Gecko for some of his ultimate rescue missions! Blue must face his fear of a storm to save Eric the Excavator, who is stuck in a trench with a dam about to overflow! Then, Weasel fits Vicky the Ice Cream truck with a super-fast rocket, causing her to speed out of control! Gecko & the Mechanicals must stop her before she crashes. From saving a trapped Mummy Truck to rescuing the Mechs, it's always a big adventure!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E4 - Important Lessons with Baby John!
programme.desc: Baby John is learning some very important lessons! First, he refuses to try his veggies & fruits, but Mom finds different ways to convince him after she sees that he'll try them if the other members of the family do it first! Then, Mom helps Baby John get through his morning routine with a fun chart. The important lessons continue as Baby John learns about fire safety with a firefighter & how to stay safe during bathtime.

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!

programme.title: E8 - In The Name Of The Father, And Of The Son...
programme.desc: Danny and Lena's investigation into a robbery gone wrong quickly turns personal, pushing Lena to devise a bold plan that tests Mae's boundaries. Meanwhile, Sean and Jonah face rising tensions with Boston's firefighters, and Sarah clashes with boyfriend Seth over family discipline.

programme.title: E18 - Jail Break
programme.desc: An imprisoned killer forces the station into lockdown by taking a hostage and attempting escape.

programme.title: E9 - Collateral Damage
programme.desc: Mae faces public and family backlash over the consequences of her past decisions, while Sarah struggles with guilt that pushes her to take risks in pursuit of justice. At the same time, Lena and Danny dive into a tense homicide case, and Jonah's anger over his father's death threatens to unravel fragile family ties.

programme.title: E12 - The Traitors UK 3
programme.desc: The ultimate game of detection, backstabbing and trust, but who will survive?

programme.title: E3 - Out Of Pocket
programme.desc: Ahead of Bailey's return home, John looks for clues to locate Jason Wyler. Then, Tim and Lucy swap rookies; a friendly face resurfaces at the station, and Wesley feels unsettled over Angela.

programme.desc: When a filmmaker dies in a cleaning accident, Elsbeth checks the subject of her final documentary.

programme.title: E10 - Johanna And Maximiliano (Argentina)
programme.desc: A Norman born in Granville, Johanna discovered tango in New York, a love at first sight that led her to Argentina. She fell in love with the country and with Maximiliano, whom she met during a class. Argentine of modest origins, former footballer and future mathematics teacher, he turned to dance after being deeply moved by a song.

programme.title: E31 - Prehistoric Mission
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: E6 - Bayou Meets Land
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: E12 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E9 - Obstacle Enduro
programme.desc: Matt takes the team through a 6 hour obstacle enduro at Raw Challenge on the Gold Coast before the series wrap-up and the announcement of our Most Savage for the season.

programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: E6 - Bayou Meets Land
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: E12 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E9 - Obstacle Enduro
programme.desc: Matt takes the team through a 6 hour obstacle enduro at Raw Challenge on the Gold Coast before the series wrap-up and the announcement of our Most Savage for the season.

programme.title: E4 - Highlight 4
programme.desc: A digger as fallen off the back of a lorry and rolled over on its side - blocking one side of a busy A road. Crouch recovery Incident Manager Steve must work out how to get the vehicle upright without being able to close the whole road – a tricky challenge indeed! Richard Crouch and recovery op Lee Brown have a hay bale of a time trying to get a valuable straw load on a broken-down trailer back safely to its owner. And Crouch recovery op Marta earns her daily bread rescuing a stricken van load of loaves.

programme.title: E1 - Save this Shark
programme.desc: 3x World Surf Champion turned wildlife conservationist Mick Fanning teams up with leading experts in new documentary SAVE THIS SHARK. Mick Fanning is on a new mission to explore shark conservation. The 3x world surfing champion will hop around the world teaming up with experts and conservationists to uncover the hidden truths about sharks, threats and how to save them from extinction. Mick will investigate the issue of sharks versus people and present problems as well as discover the latest technological solutions in how to keep both humans and sharks safe to coexist. Our host has had some incredible achievements throughout his professional career, but one moment stood out to the world live on television in 2015. A shark encounter at the J-Bay Open saw Mick Fanning become ‘the guy who punched a shark’. A huge part of saving sharks is convincing people that they need our help and putting aside the fear factor. In Save This Shark, Mick takes this incredible opportunity to go on his ow

The 3x world surfing champion will hop around the world teaming up with experts and conservationists to uncover the hidden truths about sharks, threats and how to save them from extinction. Mick will investigate the issue of sharks versus people and present problems as well as discover the latest technological solutions in how to keep both humans and sharks safe to coexist. Our host has had some incredible achievements throughout his professional career, but one moment stood out to the world live on television in 2015. A shark encounter at the J-Bay Open saw Mick Fanning become ‘the guy who punched a shark’. A huge part of saving sharks is convincing people that they need our help and putting aside the fear factor. In Save This Shark, Mick takes this incredible opportunity to go on his ow

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

E19
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88

programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: Access Middle East
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world's most dynamic regions.

programme.title: US Squawk Box
programme.desc: “Squawk Box” is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.desc: We head off to Virton, the capital of the Gaume region, which shares the title of ''sunniest region in Belgium'' with the coast! On the programme: the Baillet-Latour museum; the Wind Horse farm; downhill quad biking; city trip to Besancon...

programme.desc: Weather controls the distribution of freshwater around our planet. In turn, shapes the lives of animals across the globe, rising to an incredible diversity of species and habitats.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Having learnt where a hippos aggression comes from Steve wants to find out if we can live alongside the animal that kills up to 500 people a year. In order to see them out of the water he must come back at night.

programme.title: Night Of The Undead
programme.desc: So-hee is a newlywed with a seemingly perfect marriage. But one day, she suspects her husband Man-gil of cheating, and hires a private detective who finds out that her husband is not actually human. They also discover that he has already married several times, with all his ex-wives reported missing or dead. With the help of her school friends, So-hee tries to kill her husband, but he won't fall for her traps so easily... Tonight, their duel with unbreakable begins!

programme.title: She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...

programme.title: Yes, Madam!
programme.desc: Senior Police Inspector Ng is assigned to work with another lady inspector from Scotland Yard, to investigate the murder of an agent from the Commercial Crime Bureau of London, who was killed because of the evidence he has collected against a crime syndicate in Hong Kong. As the duo try to work around each other's polarized cultures and background, they kick and punch their way through the investigation, leading to 2 small time pickpockets Strepsil and Panadol, who had stolen the passport containing the evidence from the agent before he died. As the bumbling pickpockets try to dodge the assassins in hot pursuit, they eventually turn to the lady cops for help against the crime boss...

programme.title: City On Fire
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat plays Ko Chow, a police undercover agent who is torn between his duty as a police officer and his loyalty to his friends on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Duel To The Death
programme.desc: The best swordsmen of China and Japan have made it a historical ritual to meet every 10 years for a showdown of fighting skills and powers. The leading fighter of the Japanese ninjas, Hashimoto, and the Chinese chief Ching Wan have come to respect each other after they met, but tradition demands that they lock swords. Their honor is put to the test when rogue ninjas barge into the battlefield...

programme.title: Yes, Madam!
programme.desc: Senior Police Inspector Ng is assigned to work with another lady inspector from Scotland Yard, to investigate the murder of an agent from the Commercial Crime Bureau of London, who was killed because of the evidence he has collected against a crime syndicate in Hong Kong. As the duo try to work around each other's polarized cultures and background, they kick and punch their way through the investigation, leading to 2 small time pickpockets Strepsil and Panadol, who had stolen the passport containing the evidence from the agent before he died. As the bumbling pickpockets try to dodge the assassins in hot pursuit, they eventually turn to the lady cops for help against the crime boss...

The leading fighter of the Japanese ninjas, Hashimoto, and the Chinese chief Ching Wan have come to respect each other after they met, but tradition demands that they lock swords. Their honor is put to the test when rogue ninjas barge into the battlefield...

programme.title: Decision To Leave
programme.desc: Kind and polite detective Haejun is entrusted with a case of unnatural death in the mountains. While investigating the case, he meets Seorae, the dead victim's wife, and can't help but both suspect and develop an interest in her.

programme.title: Fist Of Stardom
programme.desc: Thongpoon wants to produce a movie by using his gift of martial art to be a leading actor. Without money, he joins a boxing gambling for finding funds, but at last he becomes a prizefighter unexpectedly.

programme.title: Café Midnight: Missing Honey
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Yoon waits for her groom Tae-young on their wedding day but he doesn't show up. Out of concern and anger, she searches for him all day and in the dead of night, she arrives at a strange place called 'Cafe Midnight', which opens from midnight until the sun rises. Upon entering Yoon finally finds Tae-young, but something doesn't seem right. He looks a few years younger and he doesn't even recognize her. As past, present and future merge, will the bride find her groom?

programme.title: The Mole Song -Undercover Agent Reiji- FINAL
programme.desc: Reiji Kikukawa graduated from the police academy with the worst record in its history. One day out of the blue, this straightforward, overly hot-blooded cop with a weakness for women is assigned to an undercover investigation as “The Mole”! He is ordered to infiltrate Japan's most feared yakuza organization in order to arrest its leader, Shuho Todoroki. Reiji goes deep undercover and his final mission is to stop the biggest illegal drug trade in history worth USD 6 billion which takes place on a luxury cruise ship sailing around the world!

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: For A Few Dollars More
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood is the 'Man With No Name,' who teams up with equally lethal Lee Van Cleef in pursuit of a sadistic killer and his band of desperadoes in this non-stop action classic.

programme.title: Sooper Se Ooper
programme.desc: Ranvir and Kukreja fight to claim a valuable plot in Mumbai. Ranvir must find his uncle to secure it, while Kukreja does everything possible to stop him, leading to intense rivalry and drama. Release Year: 2013 Director: Shekhar Ghosh
